activity: UAT / verify-work (lab integration testing of the safety gate)

test_2.name: Run -Tag Integration tests vs disposable lab OU (SAFE-01/06/10)
test_2.result: issue — 3 defects found; #1 and #2 fixed+validated, #3 pending a design decision

completed_this_session.item: Diagnosed lab connectivity: host joined to pgs.ptsc.com.vn not lab.local; fixed via runas /netonly with lab creds
Installed pinned PSFramework 1.14.457 in PS7 session
Provisioned lab OU + fixtures (lab-nested-admin nested Domain Admins member, 2 users)
Issue #1 fixed: integration tests called non-exported Invoke-AdmanMutation directly -> wrapped in module scope & (Get-Module adman){param($t)...}

Issue #2 fixed: integration tests never initialized the module -> now Initialize-Adman against a $TestDrive lab config (AdmanProtectedGroup = live Domain Admins DN; new required env var ADMAN_TEST_DC)
VALIDATED LIVE: Safety.Protected.Integration.Tests.ps1 PASSES (nested-admin refused + Refused audit record = SAFE-06 proven). gMSA/RID-500 Inconclusive (acceptable)
Issue #3 found + documented: WhatIf test OU-target crash + design fork

remaining_work.item: DECIDE issue #3 fork: (a) WhatIf test targets child USER fixtures under the OU (recommended, matches gate resolve-as-is semantics) vs (b) gate expands OU targets into child objects (product change / scope creep)
Apply the WhatIf test fix (option a) + optionally harden Test-AdmanTargetAllowed step (b) to skip RID-deny when objectSid is absent
Re-run both integration files on the lab to confirm green
Flip UAT test 2 issue -> pass once green; run/skip test 3 (DPAPI); close out phase 00 UAT (status complete) and advance phase

blockers.description: Issue #3 requires a product decision (test fix vs gate OU-expansion) before coding
Test 3 (DPAPI cross-machine) needs a second machine/user

human_actions_pending.context: WhatIf test expects Succeeded == OU child count but gate resolves identity as-is without OU expansion

human_actions_pending.action: Run lab validation after fix (lab only reachable from interactive runas /netonly PS7 session on D:\adman)
human_actions_pending.context: agent cannot reach D: or the lab

decisions.decision: Option A for issue #2 (Initialize-Adman end-to-end) over module-scope injection
decisions.rationale: true end-to-end, also exercises the init path; AdmanProtectedGroup must be a DN
OU-expansion is not a stated phase-00 requirement; gate resolve-as-is is the design

next_action: Run /gsd-verify-work 0 (resumes UAT). Confirm issue #3 option (a), apply WhatIf test fix via /gsd-quick, re-run lab, then close phase 00 UAT.
context_notes: Lab integration testing of the phase-00 safety gate. Three latent defects surfaced only on first real lab run (tests were blocked every prior run). Two fixed and the Protected test (SAFE-06) is proven live. Context was exhausted at 76% before issue #3 could be fixed. All state is in 00-UAT.md Gaps section and the two quick-task dirs.
